delegates.task: Parse the MSPM33C321A derivative user brief and produce all Stage 1 artifacts: requirements.md, spec.md, padframe_requirements.md, soc_config.yaml, and the MCU Factory Spec Advisory output.
Build a complete verification checklist and generate all scenario YAMLs for the MSPM33C321A derivative MCU (mspm33c321a_deriv).
Run nc_chipgen generate for the mspm33c321a_deriv design using all 21 scenario files from Stage 2, producing the generated design root and all required artifacts.
Run nc_chipgen verify --all --coverage on the mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu design root and produce evidence-backed verification outputs.

Review all verification evidence for the mspm33c321a_derivative design, update the checklist, generate the dashboard, and run the Signoff Advisory as the functional match for the MCU Factory Verification Review Advisory.

Execute hierarchical Place-and-Route for the mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu design using nc_chipgen's pre-generated OpenLane config, harden the wrapper macro, then run top-level chip PnR integrating the wrapper with the padframe GDS.
